command:
sleep 5 && curl -s 'https://www.hyo.world/data/feed.json?t=1776142434' | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Reports on live site: {len(d.get(\"reports\",[]))}')
for r in d['reports']:
    print(f'  {r[\"id\"]} | {r.get(\"author\",\"?\")} | {r.get(\"title\",\"?\")}')
"
